description: Admin can invite gestionnaires by entering email/name/organization. Gestionnaire receives email with quick start steps, sets password, lands on dashboard with onboarding checklist.

userStories.title: Email type + template for admin invitation
userStories.description: As an admin, I want the invitation email to include quick start steps so gestionnaires know what to do after setting their password
acceptanceCriteria: AdminInvitationEmailProps added to emails/utils/types.ts
admin-invitation.tsx template created with EmailLayout/Header/Footer/Button components
Template includes: greeting, organization context, CTA button, 4 quick start steps, expiration warning
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Type added, template created with 4 quick start steps matching onboarding checklist

userStories.title: Email service method for admin invitation
userStories.description: As the system, I need a sendAdminInvitationEmail() method following the existing pattern
acceptanceCriteria: sendAdminInvitationEmail() added to emailService in lib/email/email-service.ts
Uses same pattern: dynamic import + renderEmail + sendEmailWithRetry
Subject: 'Bienvenue sur SEIDO — Votre espace de gestion vous attend'
Tags: category=auth, type=admin-invitation
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Method added following exact same pattern as other email methods

userStories.title: Server actions: invite + resend
userStories.description: As an admin, I need server actions to invite gestionnaires and resend expired invitations
acceptanceCriteria: inviteGestionnaireAction() in user-admin-actions.ts: creates auth user, trigger creates profile+team+subscription, generates magiclink, inserts user_invitations, sends email via after()
resendGestionnaireInvitationAction() in user-admin-actions.ts: generates new magiclink, updates invitation, resends email
Both verify admin role via getAdminContext()
Duplicate email check prevents re-invitation
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Trigger handles profile+team(org name)+subscription. Magic link for password setting. after() for non-blocking email. Cleanup on failure.

userStories.title: Admin UI: invitation modal + resend button
userStories.description: As an admin, I want a modal to invite gestionnaires and a resend button for pending/expired invitations
acceptanceCriteria: Invite button added next to existing 'Nouvel utilisateur' button
Dialog with 4 fields: email, firstName, lastName, organization (all required)
Submit calls inviteGestionnaireAction, shows toast, refreshes list
Resend menu item in dropdown for pending/expired users
Resend calls resendGestionnaireInvitationAction, shows toast
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Send icon for invite button (outline variant), RotateCw for resend. Conditional rendering for pending/expired only.
